= number




== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `default`^*^
| `float`
| An optional value to yield if the target cannot be parsed as a number.

|===

^*^ Optional parameter

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.thing.number() + 10
root.bar = this.thing.number(5) * 10
----
